name: the69army-arena
description: The69Army Gaming Arena - OSRS Gamble Site

scripts.setup: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../bot && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER,BOT -c cyan,green,magenta "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd bot && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:no-bot: concurrently -n CLIENT,SERVER -c cyan,green "cd client && npm run dev" "cd server && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n SERVER,BOT -c green,magenta "cd server && npm start" "cd bot && npm start"
